_draftStatus: [DRAFT — NOT NEUTRAL UNTIL HUMAN-REVISED] AI-drafted starter content. Verify factual plausibility, anti-stereotype calibration, and structural parity with the other three affidavits before treating as production content. The symmetry CI test must not run on this file until reviewed.
name: Anuradha Sen Sharma

profession.details: Professor of Public Policy at Presidency University, Kolkata; published 32 peer-reviewed papers on labour-market informality and state welfare delivery.

declaredAssets.summary: ₹4.2 crore total: ₹85 lakh movable (bank deposits, mutual funds, vehicle), ₹3.35 crore immovable (inherited family residence in Ballygunge plus a small ancestral plot in Hooghly).

declaredCases.section: Section 188 IPC (disobedience to order duly promulgated by public servant)
declaredCases.description: Arrested during a teachers' rights protest at the University of Calcutta in November 2010. Case closed in 2014 with no conviction; the magistrate ruled the protest was within Article 19(1)(b) Constitutional limits.

affidavit.priorPublicServiceDetails: Member, West Bengal State Planning Board sub-committee on labour (2014–2019); founding board member, Eastern India Labour Studies Network (since 2008); pro bono policy advisor to the Tea Garden Workers' Union (2010–present).
